title: Advanced Quantum Detectors via Advanced Quantum Trickery
abstract:
One advantage of correlated photons from nonlinear processes is that they can have very wide spectra and very narrow time correlations. However, the value of these is lessened if not lost altogether because of detector limitations. Here we will describe our progress on some new ideas to improve detector performance. Well, new-ish.
  Full-text article not available; see video presentation
